semantic_queries.query_text: A floating photovoltaic platform built from a rectangular float module that has an internal cross shaped or cruciform frame dividing the deck into four openings, each opening holding a separate pontoon or buoyant cassette
Modular floating solar raft where a frame with orthogonal beams holds multiple detachable pontoons and supports photovoltaic modules on top, designed to connect many rafts into an array
Floating solar array mooring using concrete deadweight anchor blocks on the bottom and corner tether lines or cables attached to the corners of floating PV units
Bifacial photovoltaic panel mounted on a floating structure at a fixed tilt using triangular brackets or A-frame supports so the rear side receives reflected light from water
Floating PV performance monitoring using sensors for front and rear irradiance and top and bottom module temperature, connected to a data logger with wireless transmission to a remote database
Floating photovoltaic system with junction box or combiner box that measures string current and voltage and sends telemetry wirelessly from a floating platform to a central server

semantic_queries.query_text: Floating photovoltaic modular rectangular float platform that uses an internal cross or cruciform support to create four openings that each retain a separate pontoon, and includes triangular or A-frame supports to hold a solar panel at a fixed tilt.
Floating solar platform with rectangular float modules and corner mooring lines to concrete deadweight blocks, optionally using coated stainless wire ropes or cables.

Floating photovoltaic platform with integrated environmental and PV sensors such as module temperature and irradiance, a data logger, and wireless telemetry to a central database, built on modular floats.
Bifacial floating photovoltaic system with fixed-tilt triangular/A-frame mounting structures and monitoring of front and rear module temperature and irradiance, with wireless logging or SCADA.
Modular floating dock or pontoon platform where a rectangular frame has internal orthogonal cross members forming multiple openings that each capture separate pontoons or buoyancy blocks.

Bifacial floating photovoltaic installation that measures both front-side and rear-side module temperature and also measures front and rear irradiance, sending data via wireless telemetry or SCADA to a central database.

@(title,abstract,claims) ((floating NEAR/10 (photovoltaic OR solar)) AND (float module OR buoyant module OR pontoon module) AND (sensor* NEAR/10 (temperature OR irradiance)) AND (logger OR datalogger) AND (wireless OR radio OR telemetry))

semantic_queries.query_text: Floating bifacial PV array that measures rear-side irradiance (albedo) and both front-side and rear-side module temperature, with a data logger and wireless communication.

A floating photovoltaic pontoon where a rectangular deck has internal orthogonal cross beams forming four compartments for separate buoyancy blocks, and the PV module is held on two triangular side frames at a fixed tilt.
Floating solar system with IoT sensor package on the float measuring PV temperature and solar irradiance, sending data wirelessly to a central database or cloud for monitoring.

patent_queries.query_text: @(title,abstract,claims) ((floating NEAR/5 (photovoltaic OR solar OR PV)) OR FPV) AND ((sampling OR sample* OR interval* OR periodic* OR "time interval") NEAR/5 (logger OR "data logger" OR datalogger)) AND ((wireless OR radio OR LTE OR NB-IoT OR "cellular") NEAR/10 (transmit* OR communication OR telemetry)) AND ((server OR database OR cloud OR remote) NEAR/10 (monitor* OR store* OR manage*))

@(dwpi_title,dwpi_novelty) ((floating NEAR/5 photovoltaic) OR (floating NEAR/5 solar)) AND ((data logger OR datalogger) NEAR/5 (wireless OR telemetry)) AND ((temperature OR irradiance) NEAR/5 (sensor OR monitoring))
@(title,abstract,claims) ((bifacial OR bi-facial) NEAR/10 (temperature OR thermal) NEAR/5 sensor) AND ((floating OR pontoon* OR raft) NEAR/10 (photovoltaic OR solar OR PV))

@(title,abstract,claims) ((bifacial OR "double-sided" OR "double sided") AND (floating OR raft* OR pontoon* OR buoyant) AND (water OR reservoir OR lake) AND ((rear OR backside) NEAR/10 (irradiance OR pyranometer OR albedometer OR albedo)) AND ((front OR topside) NEAR/10 temperature) AND ((rear OR backside OR backsheet) NEAR/10 temperature) AND (monitor* OR logger OR SCADA OR telemetry))

@(title,abstract,claims) (((floating solar OR floating photovoltaic OR FPV) NEAR/20 (mooring OR anchoring)) AND (concrete NEAR/5 (block OR ballast OR sinker) OR deadweight OR "dead weight" OR gravity anchor) AND (wire rope OR cable OR stainless) AND (plastic-coated OR polymer-coated OR sheathed OR jacketed))

semantic_queries.query_text: SCADA or monitoring system for a bifacial floating photovoltaic plant measuring front and rear irradiance and front and rear module temperatures, particularly on water reservoirs or lakes, with wireless communications.
Floating PV array moored at the corners using bridle lines to concrete deadweight blocks (gravity anchors), possibly using coated wire ropes or stainless cables.

args.query: Rectangular floating photovoltaic module that uses an internal cross-shaped or cruciform partition to create four compartments, each holding a separate pontoon or buoyancy module; used as a building block for floating solar arrays.

Floating photovoltaic monitoring system for bifacial panels that measures both top-side and bottom-side module temperature, plus solar irradiance, logs data on the floating platform, and sends it wirelessly to a remote database or cloud.

@(title,abstract,claims) ((floating NEAR/5 (photovoltaic OR solar OR PV) OR FPV) AND ((backsheet OR underside OR bottom OR rear) NEAR/3 (temperature OR thermal) NEAR/3 sensor) AND ((topside OR top) NEAR/3 (temperature OR thermal) NEAR/3 sensor) AND (irradiance OR pyranometer OR albedo) AND ("data logger" OR datalogger OR telemetry) AND (wireless OR LTE OR "cellular" OR NB-IoT OR LoRa) AND (database OR cloud OR server))
